Part.Source:
if not &DataInicial.IsEmpty() &MesInicial = Month(&DataInicial) &AnoInicial = Year(&DataInicial) EndIf
If &ProCod <> 0 and &ProGraCod > 1 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod
&ProAtuEst = ProAtuEst EstPrd = 0 EstQtdFis = 0
if &SomenteProducao <> Status_SimNao.Sim and &SomenteNotas <> Status_SimNao.Sim EstQtd = 0 EstQtdCus = 0 EndIF
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, EstTipCod, EstTipAno, EstTipMes Where (EstTipCod = 3 or &SomenteNotas <> Status_SimNao.Sim) or (EstTipCod = 2 or &SomenteProducao <> Status_SimNao.Sim) //SOMENTE NOTAS OU PRODUCAO Where EstTipAno >= &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty() Where EstTipMes >= &MesInicial or EstTipAno > &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty()
delete EndFor EndFor
commit
if &ProAtuEst <> false //ATUALIZA ESTOQUE //PEDIDO For Each order EmpCod, FilCod, PedProEstProCod, PedProEstProGraCod, PedDtaFic where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedProEstProCod = &ProCod Where PedProEstProGraCod = &ProGraCod Where PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) Where Year(PedDtaFic) >= &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty() Where Month(PedDtaFic) >= &MesInicial or Year(PedDtaFic) > &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty()
&LctAtuEst = LctAtuEst &LctAtuSal = LctAtuSal &LctAtuPro = LctAtuPro &LctTip = LctTip &LctGerFin = LctGerFin
&PedDtaFic = PedDtaFic &PedCod = PedCod &PedQtd = PedQtd &PedVlrUntDsc = PedVlrUntDsc
do 'FechaEstoque'
commit EndFor
//NOTAS For Each order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeProCod, NfeProGraCod, NfeDtaFat where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeProCod = &ProCod Where NfeProGraCod = &ProGraCod Where NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada or NfeProTer <> Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA Where not NfeDtaFat.IsEmpty() and not NfeDtaFat.IsNull() Where Year(NfeDtaFat) >= &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty() Where Month(NfeDtaFat) >= &MesInicial or Year(NfeDtaFat) > &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty()
&NfeLctAtuEstFis = NfeLctAtuEstFis
&PedDtaFic = NfeDtaFat &PedCod = NfeCod &PedQtd = NfeProQtd &PedVlrUntDsc = NfeProVlrUnt
do 'FechaEstoque3'
commit EndFor
UltimasDatasEstoque.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &EstUltEnt, &EstUltSai, &EstUltFab)
//ESTOQUE For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod
EstVen = EstVen_FORMULA EstCom = EstCom_FORMULA
EstUltSai = &EstUltSai EstUltEnt = &EstUltEnt EstUltFab = &EstUltFab
EstSug = round(((EstMin + EstVen) - (EstQtd + EstCom + EstPrd)),0) EstDtaHorUltMod = now() EndFor
commit Endif EndIF
If &ProCod <> 0 and &ProGraCod = 1
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod
EstPrd = 0 EstQtdFis = 0
if &SomenteProducao <> Status_SimNao.Sim or &SomenteNotas <> Status_SimNao.Sim EstQtd = 0 EstQtdCus = 0 EndIF
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, EstTipCod, EstTipAno, EstTipMes Where (EstTipCod = 3 or &SomenteNotas <> Status_SimNao.Sim) or (EstTipCod = 2 or &SomenteProducao <> Status_SimNao.Sim) //SOMENTE NOTAS OU PRODUCAO Where EstTipAno >= &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty() Where EstTipMes >= &MesInicial or EstTipAno > &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty()
delete EndFor EndFor
commit
//PEDIDO For Each order EmpCod, FilCod, PedProEstProCod, PedDtaFic where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where PedProEstProCod = &ProCod Where PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) Where Year(PedDtaFic) >= &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty() Where Month(PedDtaFic) >= &MesInicial or Year(PedDtaFic) > &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty()
&LctAtuEst = LctAtuEst &LctAtuSal = LctAtuSal &LctAtuPro = LctAtuPro &LctTip = LctTip &LctGerFin = LctGerFin
&PedDtaFic = PedDtaFic &PedCod = PedCod
If ProGraCod = 0 or PedProEstProGraCod = 0 PedProEstProGraCod = 1 ProGraCod = 1 EndIF
&PedQtd = PedQtd &PedVlrUntDsc = PedVlrUntDsc
do 'FechaEstoque'
commit EndFor
//NOTAS For Each order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeProCod, NfeDtaFat where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeProCod = &ProCod Where NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada or NfeProTer <> Nota_ProPriaTerceira.PROPRIA Where not NfeDtaFat.IsEmpty() and not NfeDtaFat.IsNull() Where Year(NfeDtaFat) >= &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty() Where Month(NfeDtaFat) >= &MesInicial or Year(NfeDtaFat) > &AnoInicial when not &DataInicial.IsEmpty()
&NfeLctAtuEstFis = NfeLctAtuEstFis
If NfeProGraCod = 0 NfeProGraCod = 1 EndIF &PedDtaFic = NfeDtaFat &PedCod = NfeCod &PedQtd = NfeProQtd &PedVlrUntDsc = NfeProVlrUnt
do 'FechaEstoque3'
commit EndFor
UltimasDatasEstoque.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &EstUltEnt, &EstUltSai, &EstUltFab)
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod
&EstQTd = EstQtd EstVen = EstVen_FORMULA EstCom = EstCom_FORMULA
EstUltSai = &EstUltSai EstUltEnt = &EstUltEnt EstUltFab = &EstUltFab
if 1=2 //jdf rever processo lento // if ProTipCus = TipoCusto.CustoMedio AtualizaCustomedio_estoque.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &EstQTd , &EstQtdCus) // if EstQtdCus <> &EstQtdCus // &IsAtualizaCusto = true // Endif // Endif Endif
EstSug = round(((EstMin + EstVen) - (EstQtd + EstCom + EstPrd)),0) EstDtaHorUltMod = now() EndFor
commit EndIF
Sub 'FechaEstoque3' Do Case Case &NfeLctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada RecalculaEstoque3.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, 3, &PedDtaFic, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUntDsc, '+')
Case &NfeLctAtuEstFis = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida RecalculaEstoque3.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, 3, &PedDtaFic, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUntDsc, '-') EndCase EndSub
Sub 'FechaEstoque' if &SomenteNotas <> Status_SimNao.Sim and &SomenteProducao <> Status_SimNao.Sim //ATUALIZA ESTOQUE Do CAse CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada //EMPRESA ENTRADA RecalculaEstoque1.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFic, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUntDsc, &LctAtuEst, '+')
CAse &LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //EMPRESA SAIDA RecalculaEstoque1.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 1, &PedDtaFic, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUntDsc, &LctAtuEst, '-') EndCase Endif
//PRODUCAO ENTRADA Do CAse CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Entrada RecalculaEstoque2.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFic, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUntDsc, &LctAtuPro, '+')
CAse &LctAtuPro = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida //PRODUCAO SAIDA RecalculaEstoque2.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, 2, &PedDtaFic, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &PedQtd, &PedVlrUntDsc, &LctAtuPro, '-') EndCase EndSub
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&ProCod, in:&ProGraCod, in:&SomenteProducao, in:&SomenteNotas, in:&DataInicial);
